title: coffea resinosa
intro: Coffea resinosa, also known as the resinous coffee plant, is a species of coffee plant native to Madagascar. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it a potential treatment for pain relief and reducing inflammation in the body. The health benefits of Coffea resinosa include reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, as well as exhibiting antioxidant properties. Coffea resinosa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
